ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the project is being developed */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the branch belongs to */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the branch */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the branch was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the branch (e.g., active, merged, abandoned) */,
  "merge_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merge request if the branch is merged */,
  "merge_status" TEXT /* Status of the merge request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "merge_date" TEXT /* Date the branch was merged */,
  "merge_commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA of the commit that merged the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., v1.0, v1.1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA of the commit for the version */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the commit */,
  "commit_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_commit_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the metrics belong to */,
  "loc_blank" INTEGER /* Number of blank lines */,
  "branch_count" INTEGER /* Number of branches */,
  "call_pairs" INTEGER /* Number of call pairs */,
  "loc_code_and_comment" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code and comments */,
  "loc_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comment lines */,
  "condition_count" INTEGER /* Number of conditions */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity */,
  "cyclomatic_density" REAL /* Cyclomatic density */,
  "decision_count" INTEGER /* Number of decision points */,
  "decision_density" REAL /* Decision density */,
  "design_complexity" INTEGER /* Design complexity */,
  "design_density" REAL /* Design density */,
  "edge_count" INTEGER /* Number of edges */,
  "essential_complexity" INTEGER /* Essential complexity */,
  "essential_density" REAL /* Essential density */,
  "loc_executable" INTEGER /* Number of executable lines */,
  "parameter_count" INTEGER /* Number of parameters */,
  "halstead_content" REAL /* Halstead content */,
  "halstead_difficulty" REAL /* Halstead difficulty */,
  "halstead_effort" REAL /* Halstead effort */,
  "defective" TEXT /* Indicates if the version is defective (Y/N) */,
  "file_count" INTEGER /* Number of files in the version */,
  "average_loc_per_file" REAL /* Average lines of code per file */,
  "average_cyclomatic_complexity_per_file" REAL /* Average cyclomatic complexity per file */,
  "code_smells" INTEGER /* Number of code smells detected */,
  "duplicated_lines_density" REAL /* Density of duplicated lines */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of code covered by tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the defect is associated with */,
  "defect_type" TEXT /* Type of the defect (e.g., bug, performance issue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the defect (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the defect (e.g., open, in progress, resolved, closed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the defect */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was reported */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was resolved */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the defect (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* Reproducibility of the defect (e.g., always, sometimes, never) */,
  "estimated_resolution_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to resolve the defect */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Actual time taken to resolve the defect */,
  "root_cause" TEXT /* Root cause of the defect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, quality assurance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the company */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view metrics, resolve defect) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., project_id, version_id, defect_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES defects ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is for */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., code quality, defect summary) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_time" REAL /* Time taken to generate the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's key findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the comment is for */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., project, version, defect) */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment if this is a reply */,
  "is_flagged" TEXT /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review (Y/N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES defects ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., new defect, report generated) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "sent_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
